titleStmt.title: SII 29.77: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 77. (A.R. No. B. 526 of 1961-62.) SYED-CHINCHŌḶI, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup infront of the Hanumān Temple.
This highly damaged inscription contains two records belonging to two different periods and dynasties viz., 1122 A.D. of Chālukya and 1173 A.D. of Kalachūri dynasties respectively.

The first one refers to the reign of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla from the capital Kalyāṇa. The beginning portion seems to contain the genealogical account of the Chālukya family and that of mahāmaṇḍḷēśvara Goṁkarasa. It then refers to the construction of a trikūṭa temple Barma-dēhara, consecration of the god (name lost) there in and to very rich land grants, oil mills and income from certain taxes for the worship and offerings to gods, burning of lamps and for maintenance and repairs of the (newly constructed) temple and that of Kēśavadēva by mahamaṇḍalēśvara Goṁkarasa, daṇḍnāyaka Nāra(sim)hayya and others. God Bhōgēśvara finds mention in the grant portion. There is a reference to Goṅkarasara nūrippat-taruvattara baḷi. It is the same as Goṅka 120+60[180] administrative division.
The record is dated in the Chālukya Vikrams year 46, Śubhakṛit, Chaitra, amāvāsya, Monday. It corresponds to 1122 A.D., April 8, (Saturday). [Śaka year was 1044].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē . traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūla staṁbhāya śaṁbhuvē . śrīmadu bāḷa duṁ lēkhāvaḷaya vidasitōttuṁga (bhō)
lladabhirāmaṁ bavyōmātārādi caṁdrānirasavilladharātnāṁga prabhāsaṁpada grāmā vaṣṭaṁca pṛtukrī puravarē
jatā viḷāpa prēraka śrī caṁdra ḷa(līlā) ḷu bhūvaḷaya vya vakhiḷa kathā vēnammanasa bāḷa virasa vri
nāti nādada śōka ne ḷu yiddidaṁ vigāśraya madō(du) lavaniyatra nibratakada daṁ kūlalāḷa pra lalā mala(ṁ)
ka(rda)nvira dāḍude ḷā(ge) cāḷukya kuḷa .
naya satyāśrayanū ḷamānā jīyātya vāla kumudāḷi śu(vi) (mā)ḍi kīrtti yanū
(spūrti)gaḷāḷu . jaya caḷukya
jayasiṁha mēśvaradadēva
(ḷi)goṁḍu pareya (lu) cāḷukya narēśvara . ghana
pāḷaya(śa)ṁga
. Ā jayasiṁha nripāḷa tanūjaṁ cāḷukya
ya niḷjuṟe suḷdu cōḷaniṁ koṁḍu ka
bhaṁ ripu prajāḷanājīyādādūva pāla vallabha
mmādi (nri) sa (vritaḷana tāraṁ teva daṁ) daśa
di rājanaṁ cakravarti Ā nripatiya jjanā
goṁkanripa nalviṁ dēvaḍaṁge . Ī nripana vaṁśāvatāraveṁtene .
ḷa kirvvaṁka goṁka bhūpa
Ātanā putraṁ dāta . goṁkanripa jaṁ gonkanripāḷa
hā pradhānaṁ caṁdraṁ caṁdra .
completely damaged
ḷu mādudoṁdu sanmāna guṇaṁ
śōjābhu kabbegaṁ suputra niṁ dabbā yāṁ bhūṟuha jana ṁ śrī pāryyaṁ janani
taṁtaṁnagrajage bāvatagananujagenutsāhaṁ mallidēvaṁ ṇḍa bā naṁ goṁka taniya (dhva)
caṁdira . . ḷara(sa) vīra
patitōdati bhōgada dūḷu (rtipra) śa ®ta ra (vidyādhara) koṁbudu
dāḷa (khri)ta ḷugra vīra deni(dū gaḷvādārapiṁdayi)
(hāgda) naṁ karaṁ (hara) nana sūḷu
(ḍinu) yaśakīrttilakṣmī dēvi lakṣmiyanupā(rtthi)si yāśanū(sō) bara caradikā
tāya śāgaṟe ruvātadiṁ hoddeya lakṣmī tāspada (atiḷdane) bhū dira (nāte) gaḍiṁ baḷani
dida ra(ṇa)pare baṁḍi nirmmisidana rakṣitārttha
dharegeseva prabhu (cama) pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍidoḷu matākuravaṁśōdbhava sala
ḷanutara (tā)neṟesidana (barmma)dēhāraṁ ba trikūṭaṁ
māḍidana trikū (śrī svasti samasta) bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājadhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatu vikrama cakravarti tribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ salluttamire kalyāṇapuradā nele(vīḍi)
noḷu sukhasaṁkathā vi(nōdadiṁ rājyaṁ)geyvuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmasta vijayalakṣmī
ṟēvaṁtana jātakritāṁ(tha) nāmādi sarasapra sahita nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara goṁkarasara nūṟippattaṟuvattaṟa baḷiya śrīkē
śavadēvarige śrīkarahabva(dali) śrīmaccāḷukya cakravarti tribhuvanamalladēvavaṟiśada 46 neya subhakritu saṁvatsarada caitra Amāvāse (sōmavāra) sūryagra
haṇa vyatīpāta puśyanakṣatra dakṣiṇāyanaṁ dalū (pādamaṁgaḷa) śrī manmahā pradhānaṁ (bivināyya) daṁḍanāyakaruṁ śrī manumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kaṟiṁkaseya gōn
karasaruṁ śrīmatu(vi) (ci)vaḷḷiya prabhu nāra(si)yyadēva daṇāyakaru taṁmoḷēkastarāgi dēvara pūje nivēdyakkaṁ (ci)tra chētraṁ dēvaraṁgabhōga raṁga bhōga (kkū)
natiṁṣatra(ka)dalu gāṇa khaṁḍika sāsirada jīrṇnō(ddhārakaṁ) (mūḍalu) bhōgēśvara dēvara kārya teṁkalu
(gaṁji) ḍada sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu (teṁka) kuṁḍāḷipakalalage hāḷahada sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu kāla ya ttapa re yiṁ mūḍalu bhōgēśvaradēvara tōṁṭiṁ baḍaga
lu saṭṭi kāladiya (kka) teru mūḍalu bhōgēśvaradēvara tōṭadiṁ teṁkalu tōṭa kālaḍiya(ri)tta dēvariṁ paḍuvalu pura(daṁ)
teṁkalu maṭhadi kaṇa parisūgryada gōḷayādiṁ paḍuvalu nāḍu (vāṇadiṁ)baḍagalu bāvi mūḍalu bā na(ndā)purake catussīme Āpuradiṁ teṁkalu
hariya nivēśana 10 Ā nivēśanangaḷaliha brāhmaṇarā dhōtra vastrakaṁ biṭṭa yadāriyiṁ mūḍalu harinahāḍadiṁ baḍagalu kāla(ti)ya
ṁ dēvara puradalu (sthaḷa) vrittiyaluṁ harikāya (sahita) sarvasvāyadāya vellaṁ dēvage naḍemāḍuva pūjege nāḍarasaṁgaḷuṁ sōda(ra) ku(ṭṭāru)
repa gaḍḍagaḷu veddake 200 mattaru biṭṭaru Ā yaśōrbbhadāṁ Ā bhāṟavettākaluṁ haṁ koṭṭamāna koṁḍavamāna ṟatikkade dēvamānavaṁ biṭṭakalu
ge vāḍa saragu nilayā ppūvamāṟida ṁge(goṭṭa) kāṁḍagirige biṭṭaru dēvage vīḷaya(ke) hare(śa)vaṇigaru hēriṁge biṭṭaru śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
